description: Add Larry Rawlings Photography (vendor) to the Pinnacle Events Okta event-vendors group so the vendor can SSO into Slack, Figma, and Box. Standard vendor-onboarding access grant; revocable after the event season.
short_description: Vendor onboarding - grant Okta app access (Slack/Figma/Box) to photography vendor

description: Provision a vendor share for gala photo deliverables and confirm retention policy with IT. Low-risk access change for the photography vendor.
